infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MandarinMind uses the microphone so you can practice spoken Mandarin conversations.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: MandarinMind uses your local network to connect to the development server while you test the app.

plugins.microphonePermission: MandarinMind uses the microphone so you can practice spoken Mandarin conversations.

plugins.photosPermission: MandarinMind uses your photos so you can upload images for Chinese text extraction.
plugins.cameraPermission: MandarinMind uses your camera so you can capture images for Chinese text extraction.
